summary: PR #2731 improved and matched multiple LB support-library translation units under src/melee/lb, especially AX audio, background flash, collision, refract/effects, snapshot, DVD, memory, MTHP, ARQ, and dynamics helpers. The PR body reports clean formatting/check/build/dol_diff/changes_all verification and zero structured regressions; the bot report shows 7 new matches and 34 unmatched-item improvements. Review feedback was narrowly focused on not declaring __frsqrte manually because it is provided by <MetroTRK/intrinsics.h>.

key_files.role: Largest implementation/matching update; added inline range/path helpers, matched lbAudioAx_80023B24 from disabled stub, adjusted loop/local shapes and audio data access.
Large LB background flash/effects matching update; PR identifies it as higher-attention and bot report shows function and data improvements.
Dynamics/helper matching cleanup; new matches for lb_800122F0, lb_8000FD48, and lb_8000FA94; includes __frsqrte review thread.
Timer/alarm structure and OSTime typing cleanup for lb_80019628.
Refract/effects support matching work; bot report shows lbRefract_PObjLoad and lbRefract_800222A4 improvements.
Collision support-library cleanup with a small new match reported for lbColl_800077A0.
Small ARQ matching/local lifetime adjustment in lbArq_80014BD0.
Local static header support for snapshot work.

what_changed: Improved support-library implementations under src/melee/lb, scoped to the LB file family with no broad build/config or symbol metadata changes claimed in the PR body.
Moved several functions or data items to full match, including lb_800122F0, lb_8000FD48, lb_8000FA94, fn_800268B4, fn_80027488, lbbgflash .sdata, and lbColl_800077A0 per the bot report.
Expanded lbaudio_ax.c matching substantially, including recovering lbAudioAx_80023B24 from an #if 0 placeholder and adding local inline helpers for range lookup and audio path construction.

Adjusted lb_00F9.c dynamics code with ternary next-pointer assignments, ABS macro use, altered PAD_STACK sizes, direct __frsqrte-based square-root sequence, and local lifetime/expression-shape changes.
Updated lb_0192.c timer/alarm code to use OSTime for x40/new_val-related logic, introduced a union word view for clearing parts of x0, and passed &lb_804329F0.alarm directly to OS alarm APIs.
Made smaller matching updates across lbarq.c, lbdvd.c, lbmemory.c, lbmthp.c, lbrefract.c, lbshadow.c, lbsnap.c, and lbsnap.static.h.

smart_moves.text: Kept the PR scoped to LB support-library files and local snapshot header support, which matches the PR body's stated medium-risk infrastructure scope.
Used local inline helpers in lbaudio_ax.c to factor repeated range lookup/path construction while continuing to improve matches.
Replaced hand-written absolute-value branches in lb_00F9.c with ABS macro calls, consistent with canonical macro cleanup when it matches.
Typed timer storage and temporaries as OSTime in lb_0192.c instead of keeping broad u64/s64 casts everywhere.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a compiler intrinsic appears needed for a match, first check existing SDK/TRK headers before adding a local extern declaration.
evidence_refs: review_comments:fjooord asks whether extern double __frsqrte(double) is needed
review_comments:ribbanya replies that it is in <MetroTRK/intrinsics.h>

decomp_lessons.lesson: Local helper extraction can be useful in matching repeated lookup logic when the helper reflects repeated source structure and the PR has objdiff/regression evidence.
For simple select-like assignments such as list next pointers, a ternary can replace generated-looking temporary if/else code when it preserves the match.
Use domain SDK typedefs such as OSTime when the surrounding APIs and fields represent OS timer values, but keep low-level union/word views only where matching evidence requires them.

naming_conventions.convention: New local inline helpers in lbaudio_ax.c used the owning-file/function prefix pattern, e.g. lbAudioAx_800233EC_inline and lbAudioAx_SetAudioPath.
Recovered locals used short role names where roles were clear, such as slot, ranges, base, period, new_val, rate, rot_x/rot_y/rot_z, and tex_obj.
Unproven address-style globals and functions remained address-style, such as lb_804329F0, lbl_803BB300, fn_80013614, and fn_800195FC.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Adjusted PAD_STACK sizes and introduced/removed narrow stack-shaping locals in specific functions to improve match shape.
examples: fn_80013614 added u8 pad4[4] and changed PAD_STACK(16) -> PAD_STACK(12)
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Global standards require explicit verifier evidence for PAD_STACK/local lifetime tactics; this PR body reports build/dol_diff/changes_all and zero regressions, but the loaded slice does not include per-function objdiff details for each tactic.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used __frsqrte with Newton-Raphson refinement and a volatile float store to reproduce square-root codegen in lb_8000FD48.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The review only resolves the declaration/include issue; it does not independently explain why the volatile/local sequence is the authored source.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Changed local variable lifetimes and declaration scopes to influence codegen, including block-scoped GXColor in fn_80013614 and temporary tmp in lbArq_80014BD0.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Treat as narrow matching tactics rather than source-style guidance unless corroborated by local sibling evidence.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used pointer-increment loops over table storage in lbaudio_ax.c for range and array cleanup loops.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The diff supports this as a PR-specific matching shape, not a general requirement for all LB table loops.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Preserved gotos/labels in lbAudioAx_800233EC for table dispatch shape while factoring repeated range lookup.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Loaded standards prefer canonical control flow when possible; this PR evidence only supports that this shape improved matching here.

review_feedback.feedback: A proposed local extern declaration for __frsqrte was questioned; reviewer response says it is not needed because __frsqrte is in <MetroTRK/intrinsics.h>.

follow_up_queries: Search current source for remaining local extern declarations of __frsqrte; prefer <MetroTRK/intrinsics.h> where needed.
Review lbaudio_ax.c for other repeated range-table lookup patterns that could share or mirror lbAudioAx_800233EC_inline only if local evidence supports it.
Inspect LB files for PAD_STACK or dummy local changes introduced only for matching and ensure each has retained objdiff evidence.
Check lb_0192.c and related OS timer code for fields still typed as raw u64/s64 where OSTime is now proven by API usage.
Search lb_00F9.c for generated absolute-value if/else patterns that may be expressible as ABS when objdiff supports it.

notes: Changed files, PR identity, verification claims, review comments, and many representative diffs are directly loaded.
The raw diff is truncated, so details for some changed files are available only through changed-file metadata, PR body, and bot report summaries.
The PR body claims clean verification and zero regressions; this intake records that claim but did not independently run builds or objdiff.
Only one substantive review thread is loaded, so reviewer intent beyond the __frsqrte include/declaration issue is not inferred.
Some matching tactics are evident in diffs, but per-function objdiff justifications are not included in the slice; they are treated as PR-specific tactics, not global style.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Do not locally extern __frsqrte when MetroTRK intrinsics header provides it
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2731, a local `extern double __frsqrte(double);` in `src/melee/lb/lb_00F9.c` was questioned, and review replied that it is not needed because `__frsqrte` is in `<MetroTRK/intrinsics.h>`. Future decomp work using this intrinsic should check/include the header rather than adding a source-local extern.

source_update_candidates.title: Prefer SDK/header declarations for compiler intrinsics over source-local externs
source_update_candidates.text: When using compiler/SDK intrinsics such as `__frsqrte`, check established headers first. PR #2731 review notes that `__frsqrte` is provided by `<MetroTRK/intrinsics.h>`, so a local extern declaration in `lb_00F9.c` was unnecessary.
source_update_candidates.reason: This may fit the truthful-headers-and-includes standard as a concrete example, but curator should decide whether one PR review thread is enough for a global standard/example.

source_update_candidates.title: LB support libraries are shared infrastructure but PR #2731 stayed within src/melee/lb
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2731 describes `src/melee/lb` support-library files as shared infrastructure with medium review risk, while noting the changes remained within the LB file family and did not include global build/config or broad symbol metadata changes.
source_update_candidates.reason: Could be useful as path-scoped review context, but it is PR-body characterization rather than an independently established path fact.

source_update_candidates.title: PAD_STACK and stack-local matching changes need per-function evidence
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2731 includes PAD_STACK size changes and dummy/local lifetime changes while reporting clean build/dol_diff/changes_all and zero regressions. This supports routing such cases through the existing `matching-tactics-need-evidence` standard rather than treating them as normal source style.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful as an example candidate under the existing standard; not enough evidence to accept as a new rule because per-function objdiff details are not loaded.

rejection_notes: Do not generalize the lbAudioAx_800233EC goto/label shape as preferred control flow; the PR only supports it as a local matching tactic.
Do not infer broad LB naming semantics from address-style globals or fn_ symbols retained in the diff.
Do not promote PAD_STACK size changes, volatile locals, or dummy locals as accepted style; loaded evidence supports only PR-specific matching with reported verification.
Do not claim all changed functions matched; the bot report distinguishes 7 new matches from many partial improvements.
Do not infer merge acceptance resolved every review concern beyond the loaded __frsqrte comment.
